headline: PAAS Strengthens Timmins Operations With Resource Discoveries
summary: Pan American Silver unveils mineral resources at Timmins, boosting a phased development plan aimed at extending mine life and supporting growth.

raw.headline: PAAS Strengthens Timmins Operations With Resource Discoveries

headline: Is FCEL's Food Opportunity Flying Under Investors' Radar?
summary: FCEL's fuel cells let food and beverage plants make power and heat while recovering CO2 on-site - boosting resilience when supplies tighten.

raw.headline: Is FCEL's Food Opportunity Flying Under Investors' Radar?
